---
name: Feature request / idea
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[idea] "
labels: enhancement
---

**The problem / use case**
What are you trying to do that mindcairn doesn't support well yet?

**Proposed idea**
What you'd like to see. Rough is fine.

**Alternatives considered**
Anything you tried or thought about.

**Are you up for contributing it?**
(No pressure — just helps us plan.)
